changelog:
What's New in 1.4.0-beta:
[ADDED]
- Added logic to directly select Profile Avatar in the app without having to select it again on the device.

[FIXED]
- Fixed Stutter issues on some devices (maybe).
- Fixed an issue where album covers in the "Music List" section were constantly re-rendering.
- Fixed an issue with the Mini Player not focusing on one-way swiping.
